description:
Kling Video-to-Audio.

Provide a video (3-20s) and optionally describe the audio you want.

video.description: Video to add audio to. 3-20 seconds duration. Formats: mp4, mov.
video.title: Video

prompt.description: Description of desired audio. E.g. 'Ocean waves, seagulls, gentle wind' or 'Upbeat electronic background music'.
prompt.title: Prompt

title: AppInput
